phrases.en: Every morning, Dan takes his vitamins.
phrases.zh: 每天早晨，丹都服用他的维生素。

phrases.en: He picks up the small pill bottle.
He twists the cap and opens it carefully.
phrases.zh: 他拧开瓶盖，小心地打开它。

phrases.en: He shakes out two round vitamins onto his palm.
phrases.zh: 他把两粒圆圆的维生素摇到手掌上。

phrases.en: He checks that he has the right number.
phrases.zh: 他确认自己拿对了数量。

phrases.en: He fills a clean glass with cold water.
phrases.zh: 他往一个干净的玻璃杯里倒满凉水。

phrases.en: He puts the vitamins into his mouth.
He drinks a big sip of water.

phrases.zh: 他轻松地把药片咽下去。

phrases.en: He finishes the rest of the water.
He screws the cap back on tightly.
phrases.zh: 他把瓶盖紧紧地拧回去。

phrases.en: He puts the bottle away in the cabinet.
Now Dan feels ready and healthy.
phrases.zh: 现在丹感觉精神饱满，身体健康。
